title: Optionally surface Brandie review context in Sentinel dashboard and review output
description: Expose Brandie-derived review context in Sentinel only where it materially helps audits and large review sessions, while keeping Atlas as the primary review UI and Brandie as the metadata source.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentinel can optionally show Brandie review context when brand-aware Atlas metadata is present
The output stays clearly secondary to Atlas and does not turn Sentinel into a design review product
The rendering remains useful even when screenshots are missing but brand metadata is present
Examples or tests prove the optional rendering path and the no-brand-metadata fallback
proofRequirements: dashboard or output fixtures show the optional brand-context rendering
docs explain when to use Sentinel output versus Atlas output
nonGoals: replicating the full Atlas dashboard experience
making Brandie metadata mandatory for Sentinel users

notes.text: Execution started. This slice will add a compact Brandie review-context panel to Atlas-backed Sentinel dashboard output only when reviewContext bindings are present, keeping it secondary to screenshots and absent for products that do not use Brandie metadata.

Completed the optional dashboard slice by rendering compact Brandie review-context panels only for Atlas scenarios with reviewContext bindings, keeping the output secondary to screenshot proof and absent for non-brand-aware manifests. Verification passed: npm test, npm run build, git diff --check. Proof: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sentinel/t-011-dashboard-proof.png.
